About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Long Today's data reveals an exceptionally strong momentum signal in LINC, which ranks #1 with a score of 95.4, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 1,296% over 10 years and 510% over 5 years. LINC displays textbook momentum characteristics: all price moving averages are bullish (SMA 30/50/100/200), a "clean" momentum signal at 1.67, and confirmed volatility with a 1.916 ratio, earning it a "strong_buy" flag. In stark contrast, VLO shows a weaker long-term momentum profile with 454.89% 10-year returns but significantly lags SPY over the same period (228.9% vs SPY's outperformance), suggesting its recent gains are mean-reverting rather than secular. LINC's 1,070% outperformance versus SPY over 10 years and highest correlation to materials sector (XLB at 0.34) indicates exposure to a sustained structural trend, while VLO's deteriorating relative performance and positive "bad_spy_score" of 0.37 signal potential headwinds ahead. Both stocks pass all ratio thresholds, but LINC's consistency across all moving averages and superior pullback characteristics ("none")
